hooks.command: bash -c 'echo ""; if curl -sf http://localhost:3001/health > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo "✓  Nexus API is running on http://localhost:3001"; STATUS=$(curl -sf http://localhost:3001/api/auth/status 2>/dev/null); if echo "$STATUS" | grep -q '"setupComplete":true'; then echo "✓  Auth is configured — API key visible in Settings → Auth & Access"; else echo "⚠  First-run setup needed — visit http://localhost:3000/setup"; fi; else echo "⚠  Nexus API is offline — start it with: npm run dev:api"; echo "    Data is stored at ~/.openclaw/data/nexus/"; fi; echo ""'
